# InputText

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** inputs  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `InputText`

Single-line text input.

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { InputText } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### InputText

```js
const field = new InputText();
  field.dom.placeholder = "Enter value…";
  return field;
```
